name: rerun
description: An open source SDK for logging, storing, querying, and visualizing multimodal and multi-rate data
summaryZh: An open source SDK for logging, storing, querying, and visualizing multimodal and multi-rate data 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做多模态体验、视觉应用和创作工具的团队。
